---
title: "Alin Mechenici — Events & Speaking"
title-block-style: none
description: "Upcoming talks, workshops, hackathons and trainings with Alin Mechenici, Founder & CEO of chen.ist. Subscribe via iCal or invite Alin to speak at your event."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="canonical" href="https://chen.ist/alinmechenici/events/">
        <link rel="alternate" type="text/calendar" href="https://chen.ist/assets/files/alin-mechenici.ics" title="Alin Mechenici — Public Schedule">
        <meta property="og:title" content="Alin Mechenici — Events & Speaking">
        <meta property="og:description" content="Upcoming talks, workshops and trainings. Subscribe via iCal or invite Alin to speak.">
        <meta property="og:type" content="profile">
        <meta property="og:url" content="https://chen.ist/alinmechenici/events/">
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .am-ev-hero { min-height: 60vh; }
  .am-sub { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.6rem; margin-top:1.5rem; justify-content:center; }
  .am-sub a { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem; padding: 0.7rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color:#fff; text-decoration:none; font-weight:500; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.22); backdrop-filter: blur(6px); transition: background .2s ease, transform .2s ease; }
  .am-sub a:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); transform: translateY(-1px); }
  .am-sub a.primary { background: var(--c, #81BD4A); border-color: var(--c, #81BD4A); }
  .am-sub a.primary:hover { background: #6aa53a; }

  .am-event { display:grid; grid-template-columns: 110px 1fr auto; gap: 1.5rem; align-items:start; padding: 1.5rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(127,127,127,0.15); }
  .am-event:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .am-event-date { text-align:center; padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(129,189,74,0.1); border:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.25); }
  .am-event-date .m { display:block; font-size:0.72rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.08em; color: var(--c, #81BD4A); font-weight:700; }
  .am-event-date .d { display:block; font-size:1.75rem; font-weight:800; line-height:1; margin: 0.15rem 0; }
  .am-event-date .y { display:block; font-size:0.78rem; color: #6b7280; }
  html[data-bs-theme="dark"] .am-event-date .y { color: #9ca3af; }
  .am-event-body h3 { font-size: 1.2rem; margin: 0 0 0.25rem 0; }
  .am-event-meta { display:flex; gap:1rem; font-size:0.82rem; color:#6b7280; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:0.5rem; }
  html[data-bs-theme="dark"] .am-event-meta { color:#9ca3af; }
  .am-event-meta i { margin-right: 0.3rem; }
  .am-event-body p { margin: 0; font-size: 0.95rem; }
  .am-event-tag { display:inline-block; font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; padding: 0.22rem 0.6rem; border-radius:999px; background: rgba(129,189,74,0.15); color: var(--c, #81BD4A); margin-top:0.4rem; }
  .am-event-cta { align-self:center; }
  .am-event-cta a { font-size:0.85rem; padding: 0.45rem 0.9rem; }

  .am-how { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px,1fr)); gap: 1rem; margin-top: 2rem; }
  .am-how-card { padding: 1.5rem; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(127,127,127,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(127,127,127,0.15); }
  .am-how-card code { font-size:0.82rem; word-break:break-all; background: rgba(129,189,74,0.1); padding: 0.35rem 0.55rem; border-radius:6px; display:inline-block; margin-top:0.5rem; }
  .am-how-card h4 { font-size: 1rem; margin: 0 0 0.35rem 0; }
  .am-how-card p { margin: 0; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #6b7280; }
  html[data-bs-theme="dark"] .am-how-card p { color: #9ca3af; }

  @media (max-width: 640px) {
    .am-event { grid-template-columns: 90px 1fr; }
    .am-event-cta { grid-column: 1 / -1; justify-self:start; }
  }
</style>

<div class="m" style="--c:#81BD4A;">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero am-ev-hero">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/alinmechenici/chenist_cybersecurity_cover.jpg');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag">Alin Mechenici · Events</div>
    <h1>Talks, workshops & trainings</h1>
    <p>Follow where I'm speaking, training, or mentoring next — or invite me to your event.</p>
    <div class="am-sub">
      <a class="primary" href="webcal://chen.ist/assets/files/alin-mechenici.ics"><i class="bi bi-calendar-plus"></i> Subscribe (iCal)</a>
      <a href="/assets/files/alin-mechenici.ics" download><i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download .ics</a>
      <a href="https://calendar.google.com/calendar/u/0/r?cid=https://chen.ist/assets/files/alin-mechenici.ics" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-google"></i> Add to Google</a>
      <a href="#invite"><i class="bi bi-send"></i> Invite to your event</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SUBSCRIBE EXPLAINER -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Subscribe once, stay in sync</h2>
    <p class="sub">Your calendar auto-refreshes as events are added, updated, or cancelled.</p>
    <div class="am-how">
      <div class="am-how-card">
        <h4><i class="bi bi-apple" style="color:var(--c);"></i> Apple Calendar</h4>
        <p>File → New Calendar Subscription, then paste:</p>
        <code>https://chen.ist/assets/files/alin-mechenici.ics</code>
      </div>
      <div class="am-how-card">
        <h4><i class="bi bi-google" style="color:var(--c);"></i> Google Calendar</h4>
        <p>Settings → Add calendar → From URL, then paste:</p>
        <code>https://chen.ist/assets/files/alin-mechenici.ics</code>
      </div>
      <div class="am-how-card">
        <h4><i class="bi bi-microsoft" style="color:var(--c);"></i> Outlook</h4>
        <p>Add calendar → Subscribe from web, then paste:</p>
        <code>https://chen.ist/assets/files/alin-mechenici.ics</code>
      </div>
      <div class="am-how-card">
        <h4><i class="bi bi-download" style="color:var(--c);"></i> One-off</h4>
        <p>Just grab the file and import into any calendar app.</p>
        <a href="/assets/files/alin-mechenici.ics" download class="m-lk" style="margin-top:0.6rem;display:inline-block;"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-arrow-down"></i> Download alin-mechenici.ics</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- UPCOMING EVENTS -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:6rem 0;" id="upcoming">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Upcoming</h2>
    <p class="sub">Confirmed and tentative appearances. Dates may shift — subscribe to stay current.</p>
    <div style="max-width: 900px; margin: 3rem auto 0;">

      <div class="am-event">
        <div class="am-event-date"><span class="m">Every</span><span class="d"><i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i></span><span class="y">Monday</span></div>
        <div class="am-event-body">
          <h3>ON/OFF — Weekly Training</h3>
          <div class="am-event-meta"><span><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Online</span><span><i class="bi bi-clock"></i> 18:00 — 19:30 EET</span><span><i class="bi bi-people"></i> CHENIST Academy</span></div>
          <p>Weekly AI-free session on business, cybersecurity, open-source and motorcycle culture.</p>
          <span class="am-event-tag">Recurring</span>
        </div>
        <div class="am-event-cta"><a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="m-lk"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Substack</a></div>
      </div>

      <div class="am-event">
        <div class="am-event-date"><span class="m">Aug</span><span class="d">01</span><span class="y">2026</span></div>
        <div class="am-event-body">
          <h3>CHENIST Summer School — Cybersecurity & Cloud</h3>
          <div class="am-event-meta"><span><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova, RO</span><span><i class="bi bi-clock"></i> Aug 1–15</span><span><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> Trainer</span></div>
          <p>Two-week intensive on cybersecurity, cloud and AI. Alin leads modules on OS hardening, privacy, and open-source infrastructure.</p>
          <span class="am-event-tag">Tentative</span>
        </div>
        <div class="am-event-cta"><a href="/academy/events/pages/summer-school-2025.html" class="m-lk"><i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i> Details</a></div>
      </div>

      <div class="am-event">
        <div class="am-event-date"><span class="m">Oct</span><span class="d">03</span><span class="y">2026</span></div>
        <div class="am-event-body">
          <h3>NASA Space Apps Challenge — Craiova</h3>
          <div class="am-event-meta"><span><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova, RO</span><span><i class="bi bi-clock"></i> Oct 3–4 · 48h</span><span><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i> Lead Organiser</span></div>
          <p>9th edition of NASA's global 48-hour hackathon. Open-source solutions for life on Earth and in space.</p>
          <span class="am-event-tag">Tentative</span>
        </div>
        <div class="am-event-cta"><a href="/academy/events/pages/space-hackathon.html" class="m-lk"><i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i> Details</a></div>
      </div>

      <div class="am-event">
        <div class="am-event-date"><span class="m">Nov</span><span class="d">06</span><span class="y">2026</span></div>
        <div class="am-event-body">
          <h3>Cybersecurity Hackathon — Craiova</h3>
          <div class="am-event-meta"><span><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova, RO</span><span><i class="bi bi-clock"></i> Nov 6–8 · 48h</span><span><i class="bi bi-mic"></i> Keynote + Mentor</span></div>
          <p>48-hour cybersecurity challenge — CTF, incident response, and defensive operations. Alin opens with the keynote and mentors teams.</p>
          <span class="am-event-tag">Tentative</span>
        </div>
        <div class="am-event-cta"><a href="/academy/events/pages/cybersecurity-hackathon.html" class="m-lk"><i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i> Details</a></div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- INVITE ALIN -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes" id="invite" style="padding:6rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Invite me<br>to your event.</h2>
        <p>Keynotes, panels, training sessions, workshops, conference talks, podcast appearances. Topics I gravitate to:</p>
        <ul style="padding-left:1.2rem;">
          <li>European digital sovereignty &amp; open-source infrastructure</li>
          <li>Cybersecurity for SMEs — NIS2, cyber-hygiene, building blue-team capability</li>
          <li>OS hardening, privacy &amp; anonymity, air-gap networking</li>
          <li>Bootstrapping communities, Train the Trainers methodology</li>
          <li>Founder stories — Romania to Sweden, three companies, two NGOs</li>
        </ul>
        <p style="margin-top:1.25rem;">I accept invites across the EU, prefer on-site where feasible, and also record remote/virtual sessions. Honoraria and travel handled case-by-case — NGOs, universities and student events receive preferential terms.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="m-ri m-form" style="background: var(--bg, #fff); padding: 2rem; border-radius: 14px; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);">
        <h3 style="margin-top:0;">Send an invite</h3>
        <form action="https://formspree.io/f/mpwkaqev" method="POST">
          <div class="fr">
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Your name *</label>
              <input type="text" name="name" required placeholder="Full name">
            </div>
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Email *</label>
              <input type="email" name="email" required placeholder="you@organisation.eu">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="fr">
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Organisation</label>
              <input type="text" name="organisation" placeholder="Company / University / NGO">
            </div>
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Role</label>
              <input type="text" name="role" placeholder="Organiser, producer, …">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="fg">
            <label>Event name *</label>
            <input type="text" name="event_name" required placeholder="Conference, workshop, podcast…">
          </div>
          <div class="fr">
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Date / Window *</label>
              <input type="text" name="event_date" required placeholder="e.g. 12 Oct 2026, or 'any week in Q2'">
            </div>
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Location *</label>
              <input type="text" name="event_location" required placeholder="City, country (or 'Remote')">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="fg">
            <label>Format *</label>
            <select name="event_format" required>
              <option value="">Select…</option>
              <option value="keynote">Keynote / Talk</option>
              <option value="panel">Panel discussion</option>
              <option value="workshop">Workshop / Training</option>
              <option value="podcast">Podcast / Interview</option>
              <option value="mentor">Mentor / Judge</option>
              <option value="other">Other</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="fg">
            <label>Audience & topic *</label>
            <textarea name="message" rows="4" required placeholder="Who's the audience? What topic? Expected size? Anything else I should know?"></textarea>
          </div>
          <input type="hidden" name="_subject" value="Speaking invite — Alin Mechenici (chen.ist)">
          <input type="hidden" name="_source" value="alinmechenici-events">
          <input type="text" name="_gotcha" style="display:none">
          <div class="fc">
            <input type="checkbox" required id="inv-priv">
            <label for="inv-priv" style="font-size:0.85rem;">I agree to the <a href="/privacy.html" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> *</label>
          </div>
          <button type="submit" class="m-b" style="width:100%; margin-top:1rem; color:#fff !important;">
            <i class="bi bi-send"></i> Send invite
          </button>
          <p style="font-size:0.78rem; color:#6b7280; margin-top:0.75rem; margin-bottom:0;">I reply personally within 3 working days. For urgent asks: <a href="mailto:alin@chen.ist">alin@chen.ist</a>.</p>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PAST / CREDIBILITY -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="text-align:center;">
    <p class="sub" style="margin-bottom:2rem;">Previously at</p>
    <p style="font-size:1rem; color:#6b7280; max-width: 820px; margin: 0 auto;">
      NASA Space Apps Challenge · TEDx · BNE · JCI · Mjärdevi Science Park · CHENIST Academy · Romanian universities · Swedish SME networks · National TV, radio and print as a subject-matter expert.
    </p>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
